name: Rob Woodall
tweet: I’ve long believed individuals should be able to import a controlled number of drugs from abroad for their own personal use, and this action plan represents a step forward toward lower drug prices, increased competition, innovation, and better standards for patient care. (6/6)

name: Rob Woodall
tweet: The HHS Secretary established a working group to study the importation of drugs from foreign countries, and the group has been working for a year on a plan to allow targeted and safe importation in the future. (5/6)

name: Rob Woodall
tweet: That’s why I am pleased @HHSgov and the @US_FDA  recently announced an action plan for the safe importation of prescription drugs. (4/6)

name: Rob Woodall
tweet: However, despite the steps we’ve taken to increase competition and choice in the name of driving down drug prices, the cost of #prescription #drugs are still incredibly expensive. (3/6)

name: Rob Woodall
